title: Resume a tool chain after an unavailable dependency
goal: Run the import workflow without sending the final notification before the validator succeeds.
interruption_point: The run stopped after one unavailable dependency and a corrected ordering plan.

events.text: Goal: Run the import workflow without sending the final notification before the validator succeeds.
Plan: Fetch the input file, run the validator, start the import, then send the notification with the import id.
Constraint: Do not send the notification before the validator succeeds.
Source: workflows/import/validator.run requires an uploaded file handle.
Attempt: Ran the validator before fetching the file handle. The dependency was unavailable.
Lesson: The validator depends on the file handle from the fetch step.
Decision: Fetch the file first, then run the validator, then continue the import.
Next step: Fetch the file handle and rerun the validator before any notification draft.
